persona.name: Noah Johnson
persona.motivations_goals: Win the state championship and secure a Division I scholarship
persona.backstory: Worked his way up from bench player to captain through determination

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey everyone, I have an idea for a new project. Can we talk about starting a recycling program here?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Harper Garcia

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

pending_events.description: I have reached the hiding spot

actions.dialog_text: Hey Ethan, got a minute to talk about the game plan?
actions.plan: Ethan is here, I should check in with him about the upcoming game strategy.

actions.dialog_text: Harper, that sounds great, but I’ll have to hear about it later. Ethan, let’s talk strategy.
actions.plan: Harper’s talking about a recycling program, but I need to focus on the game plan with Ethan first. I’ll catch up with her later.

actions.dialog_text: Ethan, get down! We need to hide.
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot. I need to take cover immediately. Moving could make things worse, so I’ll hide here.
The shooter is in the cafeteria now. I’m hidden, but I need to stay quiet and still. Moving could get me caught.

memories.description: Approached Ethan in the cafeteria to discuss the upcoming game strategy.
Acknowledged Harper’s idea for a recycling program but prioritized discussing the game plan with Ethan.
Heard a gunshot and decided to take cover behind the cafe bar counter to avoid danger.
The shooter entered the cafeteria. Staying hidden and silent to avoid detection.
